title: cyclosorus deltipterus
intro: Cyclosorus deltipterus, also known as the Indian crow fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the fern family (Polypodiaceae). This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues. The leaves of Cyclosorus deltipterus are believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as promote overall health and well-being. The plant is often prepared as a herbal decoction or powder, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits and medicinal properties.
